misc: Known for deliberating his next shot for a long time, leading to somewhat slow play
biography: Panu is a golfer known for his meticulous approach to the game, often spending considerable time deliberating over each shot. This careful consideration, while admired for its thoroughness, has occasionally led to a slightly slower pace of play.

While his home club remains a mystery, Panu has made a name for himself at the Hector Trophée, having graced the tournament with his presence on three occasions. His dedication and skill culminated in one memorable victory, forever etching his name in the tournament's history.

Although currently considered retired from Hector Trophée events, the possibility of a future return remains open. Should he decide to compete again, his experience and past success would undoubtedly make him a formidable contender.
